CreateAppBlbPolicy.listenerPort: Listener port number under the corresponding blb
CreateAppBlbPolicy.appPolicyVos: List of policies bound to the listener. Only one policy with full match is supported when the listener type is TCP, UDP, or SSL; multiple policies are supported when the listener type is HTTP or HTTPS
CreateAppBlbPolicy.appPolicyVos.appServerGroupId: Identifier of the server group bound to the policy; required when the target group type is server group
CreateAppBlbPolicy.appPolicyVos.appIpGroupId: Identifier of the IP group bound to the policy; required when the target group type is IP group
CreateAppBlbPolicy.appPolicyVos.backendPort: Target port number. When the listener corresponding to listenerPort is TCP or SSL, specify the TCP port exposed by the server group (appServerGroupId); when HTTP or HTTPS, specify the HTTP port; when UDP, specify the UDP port
CreateAppBlbPolicy.appPolicyVos.portType: Target port type; defaults to the protocol used by the target port when the target group is a server group
CreateAppBlbPolicy.type: Required when multiple protocols exist under the listener port
